## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New JND method (adds a method to the catalogue)
- [ ] New language port (ports an existing method to MATLAB / Python / C++)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #12, Refs #34 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [coding conventions](../CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-conventions) for the relevant language.
- [ ] My function(s) implement the [unified calling convention](../README.md#unified-calling-convention).
- [ ] I updated the [Method index](../README.md#method-index) and [Method catalogue](../README.md#method-catalogue) if I added or modified a method.
- [ ] I added a BibTeX entry for any new reference paper.
- [ ] I included a method-specific README inside the new/modified method directory.
